discovery.title: Bones reveal ancient Egyptian princesses born 4,000 years ago used weapons
discovery.summary: For decades, scientists have disputed the meaning of the weapons found in the burial chambers of some ancient Egyptian princesses. Were they symbolic or practical tools? Now, a reassessment of five royal women's mummies from the Middle Kingdom has shown that some princesses buried with weapons could use them.
